title: Logical error: '(isConst() || isSparse() || isReplicated()) ? getDataType() == rhs.getDataType() : typeid(*this) == typeid(rhs)' (STID: 2508-35cc)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, value DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT number, randomString(5), random() FROM range(100);
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY name, LENGTH(name);
key_bug_features: Ordering by column size in SELECT statement
